description_long: This guard rail consists of three parallel horizontal rails supported by four vertical posts, all constructed from what appears to be dark, powder-coated metal. The rails are cylindrical and evenly spaced, providing a robust barrier suitable for urban environments such as roadsides or parking lots. The ends of the rails are blunt and squared off, with one end slightly protruding beyond the last post, giving a utilitarian appearance. The surface finish is smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a protective coating against weathering and corrosion. There are no visible reflective markings or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional design. The structure is solid and heavy, intended to prevent vehicles or pedestrians from crossing into restricted areas.
description: A dark, metal guard rail with three cylindrical horizontal rails and four vertical posts, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy finish and blunt ends.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three horizontal rails and four supporting posts, with the leftmost rail end slightly protruding.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile and the thickness of the rails and posts.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the rails and posts with the rightmost rail end slightly protruding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the depth of the structure.
